basic_details.job_title: National Book Trust Travel Desk Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: The National Book Trust (NBT) has officially announced the Travel Desk Assistant Recruitment 2026 with 1 opening. The detailed notification was published on 20 May 2026 at www.nbtindia.gov.in. Candidates who meet the age criteria of up to 32 years and hold a Bachelor's degree in any discipline with relevant travel/administration experience can now submit their offline applications from the date of publication to 01 June 2026. Direct links to download the notification and application form are shared below.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 32 years Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's degree in any discipline from a recognized university with good written and spoken communication skills in English and Hindi, Diploma/Certificate in Travel & Tourism / Hospitality / Office Administration (preferable), Minimum 3-4 years experience in travel desk operations
qualification.details: Bachelor's degree in any discipline from a recognized university. Good written and spoken communication skills in English and Hindi. Diploma/Certificate in Travel & Tourism / Hospitality / Office Administration (preferable). Minimum 3-4 years of experience in handling travel desk operations, ticketing, and logistics in a government office / PSU / reputed travel agencies.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for National Book Trust Travel Desk Assistant Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.nbtindia.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
